checks.title: Maven BUILD FAILURE must not be reported as PASSED
checks.test: never reports PASSED when a multi-module summary contains BUILD FAILURE
checks.command: vitest run tests/testOutputMaven.test.ts -t "never reports PASSED when a multi-module summary contains BUILD FAILURE"

checks.title: Consecutive full-flow runs must not hit UNIQUE constraints
checks.test: runs full flow twice without UNIQUE constraint warnings
checks.command: vitest run tests/phase11-runContextFlow.test.ts -t "runs full flow twice without UNIQUE constraint warnings"

checks.title: Flow output must not contain ccr:undefined
checks.test: skips CCR-dependent memory when CCR persistence fails
checks.command: vitest run tests/phase11-runContextFlow.test.ts -t "skips CCR-dependent memory when CCR persistence fails"

checks.title: A failed child step must make the top-level status partial or failed
checks.test: skips CCR-dependent memory when CCR persistence fails
checks.command: vitest run tests/phase11-runContextFlow.test.ts -t "skips CCR-dependent memory when CCR persistence fails"

checks.title: Unverified summaries must not be written to memory automatically
checks.test: skips auto-memory when verificationStatus is UNKNOWN
checks.command: vitest run tests/phase11-runContextFlow.test.ts -t "skips auto-memory when verificationStatus is UNKNOWN"

checks.title: Markdown compression must preserve the unique rollback strategy
checks.test: keeps a tail rollback strategy after many repeated components
checks.command: vitest run tests/strategy.test.ts -t "keeps a tail rollback strategy after many repeated components"

checks.title: Chinese queries must recall English technical memory
checks.test: recalls the timeout scenario and returns match metadata
checks.command: vitest run tests/queryExpansion.test.ts -t "recalls the timeout scenario and returns match metadata"

checks.title: hard_delete response must match database state
checks.command: vitest run tests/phase8-forgetContext.test.ts -t "permanently removes the memory record"

releasePolicy: Any P0 failure blocks the Stable Release Gate.
